name: Missinglettr
highlight_text: What it automates best - social tasks
description:
What Missinglettr Does

Missinglettr is a social media management automation platform that allows you to streamline your social media efforts. The platform offers features such as social media scheduling, content discovery, and analytics. 

Missinglettr’s drip campaign feature lets you automate posting large batches content across various social platforms. The software also has automated curation tools that make it easy to find engaging third-party content for your target audiences.

Key Features

  • Missinglettr automates the process of finding third-party content for your target audience and makes it easier to share on multiple platforms. 
  • The automation tool provides a central place to organize and view all your social media  campaign activities. 
  • Missinglettr provides images to enhance visual posts and make your content more engaging. 

Benefits of Missinglettr

  • With Missinglettr, you can easily automate content distribution on multiple social media platforms through its drip campaign. 
  • Missinglettr can enhance your visuals with its stock image library. 
  • Through its automatic re-posting capabilities, Missinglettr can help you extend the reach of your content. 

Pricing

  • Starts at $147 per month. 

Pros

  • Saves time by automating repetitive social tasks. 
  • Can help you discover relevant third-party content for posting.

Cons

  • Some features are only available at a higher pricing level.
